title: Pakistan defence minister says country in 'open war' with Afghanistan after strikes
At least 55 Ghanaians killed in Russia-Ukraine war, minister says
Pakistan Strikes Afghanistan in ‘Open War’ Against Taliban Government
text: The airstrikes came hours after Afghan troops had attacked Pakistani border positions and follow months of worsening relations between the neighboring countries.

title: Israel Facing Prospect of War With a Depleted Missile Defense
text: The June 2025 conflict with Iran depleted Israeli and U.S. stocks of antiballistic missiles. If there is another war, the pressure will be on to destroy Iranian missiles before they can be launched.
